case_title: NELSON, DAVID L.,M.D. VS HANSEN, MONTE L. et al

TERMS OF ORAL AGREEMENT AND PLFT PERFORMED BASED ON SUCH UNDERSTANDING.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DR DAVID L. NELSON FILED.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT HANSEN, MONTE L.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NELSON, DAVID L.,M.D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANSEN, MONTE L. $2,475.00 PRINCIPAL, $188.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,663.00, JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23283 ON 8-12-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY NELSON, DAVID L.,M.D. AS TO DEFENDANT HANSEN, MONTE L. LAW OFFICES OF HANSEN & JONES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-07-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08 TRIAL OF JAN-31-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NELSON, DAVID L.,M.D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANSEN, MONTE L. $3,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $38.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,338.50, BREACH OF ORAL AGREEMENT TO PAY EXPERT TESTIMONY. FOUND SUFFICIENT PROOF OF PLFT'S UNDERSTANDING OF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-07-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-07-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HANSEN, MONTE L.
